title: AI Policy Card
description: A structured declaration of AI usage (for artists) or AI acceptance (for listeners) across creative domains. Schema v1 — heteromorphiczoo.band

name.description: Band/artist name or listener display name

type.description: Band = declares usage. Listener = declares acceptance.

tagline.description: Optional single-line declaration. HZ uses 'Every note is human.'

score.description: 0 = no AI, 5 = full AI. For bands: how much AI is used. For listeners: how much AI is accepted.

qualifier.description: Optional text explaining the score. This is where the nuance lives.
